name: buildmaster-elite-tatico-v26-vercel-apk-stable
description: BuildMaster Elite Tático v26 - versão estável para Vercel e preparada para APK Android com Capacitor.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:cards && npm run test:prints
scripts.apk:sync: npm run apk:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:open: npm run apk:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run apk:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
